que: What is the primary purpose of the RichText widget in Flutter?
options: To display plain single-style text only
To display text with multiple styles and spans in a single paragraph
To load images from the network
To handle user input like a TextField

que: RichText is most suitable when you need:
options: Multiple text styles within a single text block
To capture text input from the user
